name: Nano Magic Inc.
summary: Nano Magic Inc. is a Delaware corporation that develops, commercializes, and markets nanotechnology-powered consumer and industrial cleaners and coatings. Products include lens and screen cleaners, anti-fog solutions, household and automotive cleaners, and protective coatings sold direct-to-consumer via e-commerce, big box retail, pharmacies, and through optical and industrial channels. The company manufactures products at its 29,220-square-foot facility in Madison Heights, Michigan, and retains a 30% interest in Applied Nanotech, Inc.

products.name: Lens and Screen Cleaners
products.description: Liquid and towelette formulations for cleaning eyeglasses, sunglasses, and electronic touchscreens.

products.name: Anti-Fog Solutions
products.description: Liquid and towelette anti-fog formulations for sport, safety, and industrial applications including scuba masks, ski goggles, and face shields.

products.name: Force Field Windshield Protection
products.description: Auto care coating creating a water-repellent protective barrier on windshields against rain, bugs, and salt.

products.name: Mar-Resistant and Stain-Resistant Coatings
products.description: Coatings for porcelain and ceramic surfaces such as toilets used in restaurants, cruise ships, casinos, and office buildings.

products.name: Clear Protective Coatings for Display Panels
products.description: Coatings for display panels and touchscreens to ease fingerprint removal, used in automotive and handheld devices.

products.name: Industrial Nano-Thin Glass and Ceramic Coatings
products.description: Coating liquids creating nano-thin, strongly-bound coatings on glass and ceramic surfaces for protection and easy cleaning.

products.name: Household and Automotive Cleaners
products.description: Consumer cleaning and protective coating products sold direct-to-consumer and in big box retail.

partnerships.description: Distributor selling Nano Magic branded consumer products in Canada.
